title: quercus ilex var. vulgaris
intro: Quercus ilex var. vulgaris, also known as the common holm oak, is a variety of the holm oak tree that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The leaves of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. vulgaris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Quercus ilex var. vulgaris is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as colds and respiratory infections.
